header.occasion: Phase C closure — BUGs 1, 2, 4, 5 fixed; BUG 3 (Item 4.7.5.C) re-evaluated as correct given C3 architecture

c1_complete.name: .mcp.json template revert
c1_complete.change: BlarAI/.mcp.json `VIKUNJA_PASS` reverted from `${env:VIKUNJA_PASS}` template to literal password (sourced from User-scope env var; 23 chars).
c1_complete.verify: Manual Vikunja login test with new .mcp.json: SUCCESS (token received). All 5 affected PowerShell scripts now have working credential resolution.
c1_complete.git_status: NOT committed — .mcp.json gitignored per Ticket I.

c2_skipped.name: daily_digest.py:95 revert
c2_skipped.reasoning: Original BUG 3 framing assumed logs would stay at BlarAI. With C3 (relocate logs to devplatform), Item 4.7.5.C's `_DEVPLATFORM_ROOT` scan path is CORRECT — daily_digest now scans the same location wake_launcher writes to. No revert needed.

c3_c4_complete.name: wake_launcher.ps1 path resolution
c3_c4_complete.change: 2-line edit in `devplatform/tools/scheduled-tasks/wake_launcher.ps1`: - Line 69: `$LogsDir = Join-Path $RepoRoot 'tools\scheduled-tasks\logs'` → `$LogsDir = Join-Path $PSScriptRoot 'logs'` - Line 809: `$StateFile = Join-Path $RepoRoot 'tools\autonomy_budget\state.json'` → `$StateFile = Join-Path (Split-Path $PSScriptRoot -Parent) 'autonomy_budget\state.json'`
c3_c4_complete.effect: - $LogsDir now resolves to devplatform/tools/scheduled-tasks/logs (was BlarAI; will survive Stage 5) - $StateFile now resolves to devplatform/tools/autonomy_budget/state.json (was BlarAI; was always-paused since Item 4.13.5 only touched devplatform) - Decoupled wake_launcher from $RepoRoot (-BlarAIRoot) for these specific resources. workspace pointer (-BlarAIRoot) still used for project_root; logs + state are tooling-side artifacts now.
c3_c4_complete.log_migration: 820 unique BlarAI logs (pre-fix) migrated to devplatform/tools/scheduled-tasks/logs/ for historical preservation pre-Stage-5.
c3_c4_complete.git_status: Committed at devplatform HEAD `be22a15` ("fix(stage4-remediation): wake_launcher reads devplatform state.json + logs to devplatform"). Logs themselves gitignored (filesystem-only migration).

phase_d_partial.name: unpause + verify
phase_d_partial.unpause: devplatform state.json unpaused via state.resume_fleet (last_updated_by=guide_8_remediation, utc=2026-04-29T13:06:02Z). BlarAI state.json intentionally LEFT paused (dead artifact post-C4; will be deleted at Stage 5.1).
phase_d_partial.verify_pending: Next wake-* firing window (9:15 AM local) will produce first post-fix log files in devplatform/tools/scheduled-tasks/logs/. Expected: WORK-GATE evaluation logs (no "fleet_paused=true ABORT"), claude SKIPPED if no Vikunja Gate:Pending-* labels exist.

ticket.title: Refactor PS1 scripts to direct env-var credential pattern (Python parity)
ticket.description:
Per LA directive 2026-04-29: refactor 5 PowerShell scripts to read VIKUNJA_USER/PASS/URL from env vars directly (matches Python's `os.environ.get(...)` pattern in vikunja_mcp/cli.py). Eliminates .mcp.json dependency for credentials in these scripts; .mcp.json reverts to MCP-server-config-only role.
Affected scripts (all in devplatform/tools/scheduled-tasks/): 1. wake_launcher.ps1 (lines 380-394: Test-WorkAvailable Vikunja login probe) 2. agents-cadence-monitor.ps1 (lines 41-58: Vikunja auth) 3. escalation_watchdog.ps1 (lines 44-65: Vikunja login) 4. la_merge_approve.ps1 (line 47 + 87: Vikunja auth) 5. test_async_post_gate.ps1 (line 210-215: live integration)
Refactor pattern (per cli.py model): ```powershell $vikUrl = if ($env:VIKUNJA_URL) { $env:VIKUNJA_URL } else { 'http://localhost:3456' } $vikUser = if ($env:VIKUNJA_USER) { $env:VIKUNJA_USER } else { 'blarai' } $vikPass = $env:VIKUNJA_PASS if (-not $vikPass) { Write-Log "ABORT: VIKUNJA_PASS env var not set"; exit 0 } ```
Acceptance: - All 5 scripts work without .mcp.json read for credentials - VIKUNJA_USER + VIKUNJA_URL env vars set at User scope (currently only VIKUNJA_PASS is set) - F-1 template format in .mcp.json no longer load-bearing for PowerShell consumers (only matters for VS Code MCP loader) - Phase C1's literal-password revert in BlarAI/.mcp.json can be reverted back to template safely
Effort: ~30-45 min (5 scripts × Read+Edit+verify) plus 1 PowerShell command to set env vars at User scope.

ticket.title: devplatform/.mcp.json template consistency check
ticket.description: Phase C1 reverted BlarAI/.mcp.json to literal but did NOT touch devplatform/.mcp.json (which may still have `${env:VIKUNJA_PASS}` template). devplatform/.mcp.json is read by VS Code Copilot operating in devplatform context — VS Code MCP loader handles template expansion correctly, so devplatform/.mcp.json is functional. But for consistency: either revert devplatform/.mcp.json to literal too, OR (with Ticket II completed) revert BlarAI/.mcp.json BACK to template. Decide per LA preference.

ticket.title: Cleanup BlarAI/tools/autonomy_budget/state.json dead artifact
ticket.description: Post-Phase C4: wake_launcher reads devplatform's state.json. BlarAI/tools/autonomy_budget/state.json is now a dead artifact (still on disk, intentionally paused; not read by any active consumer). Stage 5.1 deletes BlarAI/tools/autonomy_budget/ which removes it. No remediation needed unless Stage 5.1 is delayed further; in that case, can manually delete BlarAI/tools/autonomy_budget/ directory or just leave dormant.

state_post_phase_c.blarai_head: 5965f6b UNCHANGED (no BlarAI commits at Phase C — .mcp.json gitignored, state.json runtime data)
state_post_phase_c.devplatform_head: be22a15 (NEW — wake_launcher path-resolution fix; was df3d940 + b9b213d)
state_post_phase_c.blarai_state_json: fleet_paused=true (dead artifact; not read by wake_launcher anymore; will be deleted at Stage 5.1)
state_post_phase_c.devplatform_state_json: fleet_paused=false (NEW authoritative; read by wake_launcher per C4 fix)
state_post_phase_c.stage_4_status: Operationally COMPLETE post-Phase-C; ready for soak observation

next_steps.step_1: Wait for next wake-* firing window (9:15 AM local) to verify post-fix behavior
next_steps.step_2: Check log files at devplatform/tools/scheduled-tasks/logs/ for new firings (NEW log location after C3)
next_steps.step_3: Confirm WORK-GATE behavior: skip claude when no pending labels; invoke claude only when Gate:Pending-* present
